form.formComment: Well beaten last start by Pyekakariki, a rival who he faces again; was restrained, when 40 metres seventh at this track over 1770m in a 3yo+ NR up to 44 race on March 15. Hard to have.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well beaten last start by Pyekakariki, a rival who he faces again; was restrained, when 40 metres seventh at this track over 1770m in a 3yo+ NR up to 44 race on March 15. Hard to have.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 300m had to be checked away from Goodtime Miki.
Surrendered the lead to Playnice approaching the 1450m mark.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr2) over 1770m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 60 m by Millie Francis (2:08.10) in NR up to 48 on March 15 at $19. Before that 8th (Sr2) over 1770m at this track beaten 14 m by Uncle Craigo (2:10.50) in NR up to 48 on March 9 at $41. Draws the pegs so looking for big improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr2) over 1770m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 60 m by Millie Francis (2:08.10) in NR up to 48 on March 15 at $19. Before that 8th (Sr2) over 1770m at this track beaten 14 m by Uncle Craigo (2:10.50) in NR up to 48 on March 9 at $41. Draws the pegs so looking for big improvement.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 10th-19.8 beaten 13 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $81. Before that 7th (Sr2) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 7th-11 beaten 12 m by Maggie Moth (2:07.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $51. Hard to have on recent efforts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last start, 7th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 10th-19.8 beaten 13 m by Official View (2:12.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 31 at $81. Before that 7th (Sr2) over 1720m at Young, at the bell was 7th-11 beaten 12 m by Maggie Moth (2:07.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $51. Hard to have on recent efforts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced as a result of French Street breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd (Fr3) over 2100m at Young beaten a head by Tulhurst Pebbles (2:38.90) in NR up to 45 on April 10 at $81. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at Parkes on April 4. Will not find this easy. Not as keen on his chances in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 2nd (Fr3) over 2100m at Young beaten a head by Tulhurst Pebbles (2:38.90) in NR up to 45 on April 10 at $81. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at Parkes on April 4. Will not find this easy. Not as keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for the duration of the home straight.
Severely checked passing the 700m when Crimson Rock broke gait.
Hung in rounding the home turn. Tired over the concluding stages.
When leading the event had a tendency to hang in and contacted marker pegs.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Birdy Gal at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 24 at $12. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Always Be Brendan at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 47 on March 30 at $8. Strong prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into tenth behind Birdy Gal at Menangle over 1609m in a 3yo+ 0LTW o eligible 3yo+ NR47 on March 24 at $12. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Always Be Brendan at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 47 on March 30 at $8. Strong prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked at the 1300m when The Handsome One broke stride and veered in.

form.formComment: Last start a big 13 m win (Sr2) at Temora (2:00.90) beating Alice On The Beach in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $3.70 at the bell was leading 2.8. Can play a role in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start a big 13 m win (Sr2) at Temora (2:00.90) beating Alice On The Beach in NR 34 to 38 on April 6 at $3.70 at the bell was leading 2.8. Can play a role in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up in the home straight and not fully tested.
Hung in entering and rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Last start from midfield and posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Sr2) at Junee (2:11.50) beating Stars Abroad in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $1.90 at the bell was leading 1.6. Sure to be in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start from midfield and posted a big 6 m win as favourite (Sr2) at Junee (2:11.50) beating Stars Abroad in NR 39 to 40 on March 31 at $1.90 at the bell was leading 1.6. Sure to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages of the event.
Inconvenienced approaching the 1400m when Angelic Attitude broke gait.

form.formComment: In good form recently. Last start posted a big 9 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:11.80) beating Sergeant Pee Jay in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 15 at $1.22 at the bell was leading 5.6. Sure to play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In good form recently. Last start posted a big 9 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at this track (2:11.80) beating Sergeant Pee Jay in 3yo+ NR up to 44 on March 15 at $1.22 at the bell was leading 5.6. Sure to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to hang in under pressure.
Locked wheels with Goodtime Jazzi approaching the 1400m and was inconvenienced.

form.formComment: Six-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Temora and Junee. Last start won by 5 m when quickly away, (Fr5) at Temora (2:01.50) beating Betterthantheboyz in NR 39 to 41 on April 6 at $8 at the bell was leading 2. Winning form deserves respect.
